mapper.select: SELECT ro.order_id, ro.user_id, ro.category_id, ro.description, ro.status, ro.priority, ro.created_time, ro.updated_time, ro.appointment_time, ro.assigned_worker, ro.finished_time, ro.building_no, ro.unit_no, ro.room_no, ro.phone, re.content AS evaluation, re.score AS rating, rc.category_name FROM repair_order ro LEFT JOIN repair_category rc ON ro.category_id = rc.category_id LEFT JOIN repair_evaluation re ON ro.order_id = re.assignment_id WHERE ro.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ro.created_time DESC

SELECT ro.order_id, ro.user_id, ro.category_id, rc.category_name, ro.description, ro.priority, ro.status, ro.created_time, ro.updated_time, ro.appointment_time, ro.assigned_worker, ro.finished_time, ro.building_no, ro.unit_no, ro.room_no, ro.phone, IFNULL(u.nickname, u.username) AS name, re.content AS evaluation, re.score AS rating, re.reply_content AS replyContent, re.reply_time, e.nickname AS workerName FROM repair_order ro LEFT JOIN repair_category rc ON ro.category_id = rc.category_id LEFT JOIN repair_evaluation re ON ro.order_id = re.assignment_id LEFT JOIN user u ON ro.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN employee e ON ro.assigned_worker = e.employee_id WHERE ro.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_order (user_id, category_id, description, priority, created_time, updated_time, assigned_worker, finished_time, building_no, unit_no, room_no, phone, appointment_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{description}, #{priority}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime}, #{assignedWorker}, #{finishedTime}, #{buildingNo}, #{unitNo}, #{roomNo}, #{phone}, #{appointmentTime})
INSERT INTO repair_file (order_id, file_url, file_type, uploaded_at, user_id) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileType}, NOW(), #{userID})
INSERT INTO repair_assignment (order_id, worker_id, assigned_by, assigned_time, visiting_time, status) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{workerId}, #{assignedBy}, NOW(), #{visitingTime}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT assignment_id, order_id, worker_id, assigned_by, assigned_time, visiting_time, status FROM repair_assignment WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY assigned_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: update repair_order set assigned_worker = #{workerId}, status = #{status}, updated_time = NOW() where order_id = #{orderId}
UPDATE repair_assignment SET worker_id = #{workerId}, status = '已接受', assigned_time = NOW() WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO repair_assignment (order_id, worker_id, assigned_by, assigned_time, visiting_time, status) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{workerId}, #{workerId}, NOW(), NULL, '已接受')
mapper.select: SELECT rw.* FROM repair_worker rw INNER JOIN repair_category rc ON rw.specialty LIKE CONCAT('%', rc.category_name, '%') WHERE rc.category_id = #{categoryId} AND rw.worker_id NOT IN ( SELECT ra.worker_id FROM repair_assignment ra WHERE ra.visiting_time IS NOT NULL AND ra.visiting_time BETWEEN DATE_SUB(#{appointmentTime}, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AND DATE_ADD(#{appointmentTime}, INTERVAL 1 HOUR) )
SELECT e.* FROM employee e WHERE (e.permission LIKE '%维修%')
mapper.update: update repair_order set status = #{status} where order_id = #{orderId}
update repair_order set assigned_worker = #{workerId}, status = '维修中', updated_time = NOW() where order_id = #{orderId}
INSERT INTO repair_evaluation (assignment_id, user_id, score, content, eval_time) VALUES (#{orderId}, (SELECT user_id FROM repair_order WHERE order_id = #{orderId}), #{rating}, #{evaluation}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM repair_evaluation WHERE assignment_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY eval_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE repair_evaluation SET reply_content = #{replyContent}, reply_time = NOW() WHERE assignment_id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT count(*) FROM repair_order WHERE status = #{status}
